official_sources.evidence: Realtime and REST examples use product_code values such as BTC_JPY and FX_BTC_JPY.

runtime_isolation: Do not expose bitFlyer Crypto CFD/FX as generic futures/perpetual without a separate contract model and product-scope guard.
unsupported_runtime_reason: Current spot adapter can see Lightning product codes but lacks a gateway contract model, position/margin/risk parser and product-scoped order reconciliation for Crypto CFD/FX.
required_auth_and_scope: decide gateway MarketType for Crypto CFD/FX before advertising capability
product-code guard separate from Spot BTC_JPY
unsafe_to_promote_without: clear mapping that FX_BTC_JPY is not generic futures/perpetual
remaining_work: decide gateway MarketType/contract model for Crypto CFD
separate symbol metadata and risk semantics from Spot
add position/margin parser and read-only reconciliation before runtime promotion
